descriptionTemplate:
For every 1% {Death Resistance} Lily and her equipped WoD & Covenant have, the Base Shield of {Forbidden Swamp} and "Basic Defense" +0.25%, and in Boss Battles, the accumulation and limit of {Endure} increase by 0.25%.
When Lily is in the team, gain 1 stack of {Endure} for each lost HP, with an {Endure} stack limit equal to Max HP.
